mapper.select:
SELECT MUGR.GATE_CD , MUGR.MODULE_TYPE , MUGR.MENU_GROUP_CD , GETMULTINAME(MUGR.GATE_CD, 'MG', #{ses.langCd}, MUGR.MENU_GROUP_CD, '') AS MENU_GROUP_NM , GETMULTINAME(MUGR.GATE_CD, 'TG', #{ses.langCd}, MUTG.TMPL_MENU_GROUP_CD, '') AS TMPL_MENU_GROUP_NM , (MUGR.REG_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS REG_DATE , MUGR.TMPL_MENU_GROUP_CD , MUGR.USE_FLAG , CASE WHEN UR.USER_NM IS NULL THEN MUGR.REG_USER_ID ELSE UR.USER_NM END AS REG_USER_ID , ('') AS SCREEN_NM_IMG , 'U' AS INSERT_FLAG FROM STOCMUGR MUGR JOIN STOCMUTG MUTG ON (MUGR.GATE_CD = MUTG.GATE_CD AND MUGR.TMPL_MENU_GROUP_CD = MUTG.TMPL_MENU_GROUP_CD) LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCUSER UR ON (MUGR.GATE_CD = UR.GATE_CD AND MUGR.REG_USER_ID = UR.USER_ID AND UR.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE MUGR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND MUGR.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND MUGR.MODULE_TYPE = #{MODULE_TYPE}
AND UPPER(GETMULTINAME(MUGR.GATE_CD, 'MG', #{ses.langCd}, MUGR.MENU_GROUP_CD, '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{MENU_GROUP_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETMULTINAME(MUGR.GATE_CD, 'TG', #{ses.langCd}, MUTG.TMPL_MENU_GROUP_CD, '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{TMPL_MENU_GROUP_NM}) '%'
ORDER BY MUGR.MENU_GROUP_CD
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO STOCMUMS ( GATE_CD , MENU_CD , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , USE_FLAG , MODULE_TYPE , MENU_GROUP_CD , TMPL_MENU_CD ) SELECT A.GATE_CD
, A.MENU_CD 'C' TO_CHAR((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCMUMS B WHERE B.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND B.MENU_CD LIKE A.MENU_CD 'C%') + 1)
, A.MENU_CD 'C' CONVERT(VARCHAR, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCMUMS B WHERE B.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND B.MENU_CD LIKE A.MENU_CD + 'C%') + 1)
, A.REG_DATE , A.REG_USER_ID , A.MOD_DATE , A.MOD_USER_ID , A.DEL_FLAG , A.USE_FLAG , #{MODULE_TYPE} , #{MENU_GROUP_CD} , A.TMPL_MENU_CD FROM STOCMUMS A WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND MENU_GROUP_CD = #{OLD_MENU_GROUP_CD} AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0'
